name: Feature request

title: "[Feature]: "

---

## Problem or opportunity

What learner, teacher, or developer need would this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Additional context

Add screenshots, examples, article sources, or workflow notes if helpful. Do not include private learner data or credentials.
